bio:
My skill set includes wireframe and prototype development, backed by extensive knowledge in user research and testing. I've contributed to customer retention and business growth in sectors like Fintech, Insurance, and Retail. I've effectively led teams in delivering key UX insights and design deliverables.

Recently, I've integrated AI tools into my design workflow — from research to delivery — to enhance quality, expand ideas, and align work with business objectives, without compromising on quality or human touch.

timeline.desc: Supporting Pre-sales and AI initiatives, leading design strategy for new business opportunities and AI-driven product experiences.
Leading UX initiatives within the ETF's Platform. Designing new user flows and enhancing experiences for diverse stakeholders who engage daily with the platform.
Designed, researched and validated digital experiences meeting clear business objectives in e-commerce, AI and technology projects.
Led the discovery process to understand user needs in the creation of a new Catalog/Warehouse/Sales channel management system.
Lead research, user testing and flow design activities for client projects in insurance, e-commerce and partners such as Google.
